summary: The diff modifies 4 files, primarily updating frontend release/version tracking utilities (expectedProductionVersion.ts, smokeTestChecklist.ts) to reference Version 49 / v1.4.9.0, and updating project_state.json and a file summaries document. The changes appear to be preparatory/tracking artifacts for a production deployment rather than the actual promotion of a draft to production. There is no evidence of deployment configuration changes, infrastructure updates, canister deployment scripts, or any mechanism that would actually push the draft to the live production environment.

missing_requirements.requirement: Promote the current draft version (Version 49) to production, making it the live version of the application.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only updates version tracking and smoke test files plus project state metadata. There is no evidence of actual deployment steps such as deployment scripts, CI/CD pipeline changes, canister upgrade commands, or environment configuration changes that would promote the draft to a live production environment. The acceptance criteria that the production environment reflects Version 49 changes and the application is accessible and functional in production cannot be confirmed from these file changes alone.

hallucinated_features.description: Version comparison utility with normalization logic including normalizeVersion, isVersionMatch, and getVersionStatus functions
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks to promote draft Version 49 to production. Adding version matching and comparison utilities with UI status reporting was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Detailed smoke test checklist with category progress tracking for health, admin, and member flows
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request a smoke test checklist feature or category progress utilities. This is additional tooling beyond the scope of promoting a draft to production.
